lessons.title: 面试开场：自我介绍不尴尬
lessons.transcript:
Thanks for having me today.
I've spent the last five years working on classroom innovation.
I focus on turning complex goals into practical routines.

chunks.meaningZh: 感谢今天给我这个机会。
chunks.commonMistake: 不要说 Thanks for your interview
chunks.correctionGood: Thanks for having me today.
chunks.mission: 用这句开场并接一句你的核心优势。

chunks.text: I've spent the last five years...
alt: Over the past five years, I've...
chunks.pattern: I've spent the last + 时间 + doing...
chunks.correctionGood: I've spent the last five years working on...
chunks.mission: 说出你过去 3-5 年的一个重点。

chunks.correctionGood: I turn complex goals into practical routines.
chunks.mission: 用 turn A into B 说一个真实案例。

lessons.title: 会议表达：先认同再补充
lessons.transcript:
That's a fair point.
I agree with the direction, and I'd add one concern.
If we adjust the timeline, we can reduce risk.

chunks.commonMistake: fair 不是公平交易语境
chunks.correctionBad: You are right but you are wrong.
chunks.correctionGood: That's a fair point, and I'd add one concern.
chunks.mission: 先认可，再提出一个不同意见。

chunks.usageNote: 比 I disagree 更柔和
chunks.correctionGood: I'd add one concern.
chunks.mission: 围绕一个项目风险说 2 句。

chunks.commonMistake: 不要说 low risk as verb
chunks.pattern: If we ..., we can reduce risk.
chunks.correctionGood: We can reduce risk.
chunks.mission: 用 if 条件句提出一个降风险建议。

lessons.title: 社交寒暄：优雅结束聊天
lessons.transcript:
It's been great talking with you.
I should get going, but let's stay in touch.
Have a lovely evening.

chunks.text: It's been great talking with you.
chunks.correctionBad: I am happy talk with you.
chunks.correctionGood: It's been great talking with you.
chunks.mission: 用这句自然结束一次聊天。

chunks.commonMistake: 不要说 I must go now 太硬
chunks.correctionGood: I should get going.
chunks.mission: 搭配 but 说一个后续动作。

chunks.correctionGood: Let's stay in touch.
chunks.mission: 完成 20 秒告别话术。

lessons.title: 请求帮助：不卑不亢
lessons.transcript:
Could you help me review this draft?
I'd really value your feedback.
A quick 10-minute look would be enough.

chunks.pattern: Could you help me + 动词原形
chunks.correctionGood: Could you help me review this draft?
chunks.mission: 请求同事帮你看一个文件。

alt: Your feedback would mean a lot.
chunks.correctionGood: I'd really value your feedback.
chunks.mission: 先请求，再表达重视。

chunks.pattern: A quick + 时间 + look would be enough.
chunks.correctionBad: Please spend much time for me.
chunks.correctionGood: A quick 10-minute look would be enough.
chunks.mission: 把请求拆成可执行的小动作。

lessons.title: 拒绝邀约：体面说不
lessons.transcript:
I appreciate the invitation.
I won't be able to make it this time.
I'd love to join next week if that works.

alt: Thanks so much for inviting me.
chunks.correctionGood: I appreciate the invitation.
chunks.mission: 拒绝前先给一句感谢。

chunks.text: I won't be able to make it.
chunks.commonMistake: make it 表示赶到/参加
alt: I can't make it this time.
chunks.pattern: I won't be able to make it + 时间
chunks.correctionGood: I won't be able to make it this time.
chunks.mission: 拒绝并给出时间限定。

chunks.pattern: I'd love to ..., if that works.
chunks.correctionGood: I'd love to join next week if that works.
chunks.mission: 拒绝后给一个可行替代。

lessons.title: 冲突场景：先降温
lessons.transcript:
I hear your frustration.
Let's take a step back and look at the facts.
I want us to solve this, not blame each other.

chunks.correctionGood: I hear your frustration.
chunks.mission: 先共情一句，再进入事实。

chunks.pattern: Let's take a step back and ...
chunks.correctionGood: Let's take a step back and look at the facts.
chunks.mission: 用这句把讨论拉回事实。

chunks.correctionGood: I want us to solve this, not blame each other.
chunks.mission: 做一段 25 秒冲突降温表达。

lessons.title: 邮件口语化：催进度不冒犯
lessons.transcript:
Just checking in on the timeline.
Do you think we can finalize this by Friday?
Let me know if you need anything from me.

chunks.pattern: Just checking in on + 名词
chunks.correctionGood: Just checking in on the timeline.
chunks.mission: 用 checking in 发一条礼貌提醒。

chunks.pattern: Can we + 动词 + by + 时间
chunks.correctionGood: Do you think we can finalize this by Friday?
chunks.mission: 说一个你的本周截止节点。

chunks.text: if you need anything from me
chunks.commonMistake: anything from me 固定搭配
alt: happy to help on my side
chunks.pattern: Let me know if you need anything from me.
chunks.correctionGood: Let me know if you need anything from me.
chunks.mission: 催进度后补一句支持。

lessons.title: 课堂表达：给学生积极反馈
lessons.transcript:
Good try.
You're getting clearer every time.
Let's fix one small part and try again.

chunks.correctionGood: Good try.
chunks.mission: 先鼓励再给一个改进点。

chunks.correctionGood: You're getting clearer every time.
chunks.mission: 描述对方一个进步趋势。

chunks.correctionGood: Let's fix one small part and try again.
chunks.mission: 给学生一个可执行的改进动作。

lessons.title: 客户沟通：延迟交付说明
lessons.transcript:
I want to give you a quick update.
We're experiencing a short delay due to testing.
The new delivery date is next Tuesday, and we'll keep you posted.

chunks.pattern: I want to give you a quick update.
chunks.correctionGood: I want to give you a quick update.
chunks.mission: 30 秒内完成状态更新开场。

alt: There is a slight delay on our side.
chunks.pattern: We're experiencing + 问题 + due to + 原因
chunks.correctionGood: We're experiencing a short delay due to testing.
chunks.mission: 说清问题 + 原因，不甩锅。

chunks.correctionGood: We'll keep you posted.
chunks.mission: 延期说明结尾加承诺句。

lessons.title: 表达观点：不同意但不对立
lessons.transcript:
I see it differently.
From my perspective, the priority is user retention.
Can we test both options before deciding?

chunks.correctionGood: I see it differently.
chunks.mission: 用 because 补充你的依据。

chunks.correctionGood: From my perspective, the priority is user retention.
chunks.mission: 说出你当前工作的优先级。

chunks.pattern: Can we test both options before ...?
chunks.correctionGood: Can we test both options before deciding?
chunks.mission: 提出一个可执行的小实验。
